title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: - `High`: No findings. - `Medium`: No findings. - `Low (residual)`: Possible smoke data residue if intake succeeds but `runHappySmoke` throws before returning (e.g., task-detail/recovery failure), because `smokeTaskId` is only captured after `runHappySmoke(...)` resolves and cleanup deletes by `smokeTaskId` only when set ([smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:246), [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:251), [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:259), [smoke-happy-api.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-api.js:136), [smoke-happy-api.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-api.js:162)).
